summary: Complete testing of Voice Assistant 'Eleitora' feature. Backend 11/11 tests passed for voice endpoints. Frontend UI verified with voice button, chat integration, voice toggle, and quick actions all functional. TTS (Text-to-Speech) confirmed working with MP3 audio generation.

issues: Non-blocking console warnings about chart dimensions during initial render (existing issue from previous iteration)

passed_tests: POST /api/voice/transcribe accepts audio file upload with auth
POST /api/voice/speak converts text to MP3 audio
POST /api/voice/command accepts audio and returns transcribed_text, command, response_text, success fields
GET /api/voice/greeting returns greeting text and MP3 audio
TTS generates valid MP3 audio (verified base64 decoding)
Voice assistant module properly imported in server.py
Frontend Assistente page loads with voice button
Frontend voice record button [data-testid='voice-record-btn'] visible and enabled
Frontend voice toggle (Voz Ativa/Desativada) works correctly
Frontend chat input and send button functional
Frontend quick actions (4 buttons) all visible and clickable
Frontend shows 'Eleitora falando...' indicator during TTS playback
Frontend shows voice command examples section
AI responses contain real campaign financial data
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data from user alan.garcia@teste.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Voice Assistant Eleitora fully tested. Key findings: 1) POST /api/voice/command is the main endpoint - accepts audio file, transcribes with Whisper, parses commands, executes actions, returns text response + TTS audio. 2) POST /api/voice/speak converts text to MP3 audio. 3) POST /api/voice/transcribe converts audio to text. 4) GET /api/voice/greeting returns welcome message with audio. 5) Frontend uses MediaRecorder API for audio capture. 6) TTS uses OpenAI voice 'nova' at 1.0x speed. 7) Voice commands support: saldo, receitas, despesas, contratos, add_expense, add_revenue, navigate, and AI chat fallback. 8) Audio responses are base64-encoded MP3.

features_verified.voice_transcribe_endpoint: Working - POST /api/voice/transcribe converts audio to text via Whisper
features_verified.voice_speak_endpoint: Working - POST /api/voice/speak converts text to MP3 audio via TTS
features_verified.voice_command_endpoint: Working - POST /api/voice/command full pipeline: transcribe -> parse -> execute -> TTS response
features_verified.frontend_voice_toggle: Working - Can toggle between Voz Ativa/Desativada
features_verified.frontend_voice_indicator: Working - Shows 'Eleitora falando...' during TTS playback
features_verified.frontend_chat_integration: Working - Voice and text chat share conversation history
features_verified.tts_audio_format: Working - Valid MP3 audio generated (24KB-133KB per response)
features_verified.whisper_integration: Working - Uses OpenAI Whisper model via emergentintegrations

voice_commands_supported.query_saldo: Returns current balance, total revenues, total expenses
voice_commands_supported.query_receitas: Returns count and total of revenues
voice_commands_supported.query_despesas: Returns count, total, and pending expenses
voice_commands_supported.query_contratos: Returns count and total value of contracts
voice_commands_supported.query_alertas: Returns pending payments and missing docs alerts
voice_commands_supported.add_expense: Adds expense by voice with amount and category
voice_commands_supported.add_revenue: Adds revenue by voice with amount
voice_commands_supported.navigate: Navigates to dashboard, despesas, receitas, contratos, relatorios
voice_commands_supported.ai_chat: Fallback to AI for complex questions
